title: Bhakti Suman
desc: A religious leader provides a detailed discourse on various spiritual teachings to devotees and encourages them to lead a faithful life.

title: Bhor Bhakti
desc: The host talks about India's different customs and traditions. He explains how people celebrate in various states. Learn about India's rich cultural diversity. Enjoy the journey.

title: Paramavatar Shri Krishna
desc: Lord Krishna, once a naughty little child, grows up and embarks on a number of adventures to fight and eradicate evil forces and provide justice to all.

title: Kundali Bhagya
desc: Pragya Arora's long-lost sisters, Preeta and Srishti, plot their own course in fate's uncharted waters where adversities and good times go hand in hand.

title: Jaane Anjaane Hum Mile
desc: In the hospital, police ask Poonam about her injuries. After a while, she reveals Viren beat her and it was not an accident, shocking everyone.

title: Vasudha
desc: Vasudha admits to Madhav that she will not be able to marry him. So, Madhav tells Chandrika that he cannot marry a maid, to save Vasudha.

title: Meet
desc: Meet makes Babita realise that Anubha can take care of her at her maternal house and Babita apologises. Later, Meet Ahlawat's photographer friend, Tanya, arrives and takes him with her.

title: Meet
desc: Babita arrives at the Hooda House to drop Meet and apologises to Anubha as Tej and Hoshiyar keep an eye on Meet Ahlawat and Tanya. Later, a disguised Meet Ahlawat visits Meet to profess his feelings.

title: Zindagi Ki Mehek
desc: Mahek, a talented and aspiring chef, enters a cooking competition to follow her passion. Her life takes an unexpected turn when she crosses paths with Shaurya, the arrogant judge of the competition.

title: Guddan Tumse Na Ho Payega
desc: Dadi chides AJ for scolding Guddan, but AJ tells her that he did it so no one else gets a chance to reproach her. Later, when the 'puja' begins, Rawat plots against AJ, but Guddan foils his plans.

title: Kumkum Bhagya
desc: Prachi reveals Rhea's self-harm attempt and Mr Mehra's hurtful remarks to Pragya. Later, an enraged Pragya storms off to confront Mr Mehra.

title: Kumkum Bhagya
desc: Alia attempts to murder Pragya to prevent her encounter with Abhi. Meanwhile, Prachi becomes distressed about her situation with Mr Mehra.

title: Kumkum Bhagya
desc: Pragya and Abhi find their lives entwined in a cruel twist of fate. However, despite their initial aversion towards one another, they fall in love and fight to be together against all odds.

title: Jaane Anjaane Hum Mile
desc: Raghav faces media questions and is struck by a rock during the encounter. Meanwhile, Reet discovers Poonam missing as she considers taking her own life.

title: Vasudha
desc: Karishma instructs Sarika to seat Devansh and Vasudha together at the Dosha Nivaran Puja. She then feigns a sprained ankle to further her hidden agenda.

title: Meet
desc: Whether it be employment or an unexpected marriage to her namesake, the tomboyish and fun-loving Meet challenges social conventions and gender roles every step of the way.
